---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Pegasus Dashboard
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
